# ERPlora UX · Full Reference (v2.2.0)

This document is the **complete machine-readable inventory** of every class
shipped by the library. Drop it into an LLM context window when you need
exhaustive autocompletion, code-review, or generation against the library.

For a shorter agent-focused guide, see AGENTS.md.

---

## What this is

CSS-only semantic component library. Single bundle:
`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ERPlora/ux@main/dist/erplora-ux.min.css`

Class prefix: `ux-`
BEM-light pattern: `ux-{block}__{element}--{modifier}`
Runtime states: `is-active`, `is-open`, `is-loading`, `is-disabled`, `is-selected`
Themes: `data-theme="erplora" | "erplora-light"` on `<html>` or any subtree.
Templates (palette overrides): `data-template="corporate|minimal|forest|ocean|violet"` (each has `-light` variant).

Optional Datastar interactivity: `data-signals`, `data-show`, `data-bind-*`,
`data-on-click`, `data-class-*`. Library is functional without JS. ALL preview
demos in this repo use Datastar exclusively — copy-paste any block and it works.

## Grid system (read this first when laying out a page)

Use in this order of preference:

1. `.ux-container[--narrow|--reading|--wide|--full|--fluid]` — page max-width wrapper.
2. `.ux-row` + `.ux-col-{1..12}` (mobile-first) + `.ux-col-{sm|md|lg}-{1..12}` — 12-col responsive grid.
3. `.ux-grid-auto[--xs|--sm|--md|--lg|--xl]` — auto-fit minmax (cards, gallery). Add `--dense` for masonry pack.
4. Container queries: `.ux-cq` wrapper + `.ux-col-cq-{1..12}` (container ≥ 480px) and `.ux-col-cq-lg-{1..12}` (≥ 720px).
5. Subgrid: `.ux-row--subgrid` to inherit parent tracks.
6. Aspect cells: `.ux-cell-{square|video|photo|portrait|wide}`.
7. Sticky col helper: `.ux-col-sticky`.
8. Logical spacing: `.ux-px-{3,4,6}`, `.ux-py-{3,4,6}`, `.ux-mx-auto`, `.ux-my-auto`.
9. Visibility: viewport `.ux-hide-{sm|md|lg}`, container `.ux-show-cq-md` / `.ux-hide-cq-md`.
10. Legacy fixed grids (still supported): `.ux-grid-2 / -3 / -4 / -6` (auto-collapse).

Three breakpoints: mobile ≤ 767 · tablet 768-1199 · desktop ≥ 1200. Container queries unlock component-relative responsiveness when the viewport is wrong axis.

## Status / color modifiers (consistent across components)

- `--brand`           Primary accent (terracota, or template's brand)
- `--ok` / `--leaf`   Success
- `--warn`            Warning
- `--danger`          Error / destructive
- `--info`            Informational
- `--solid`           Filled variant
- `--ghost`           Borderless minimal variant
- `--outline`         Border-only variant
- `--sm` / `--lg` / `--xs` / `--xl`   Size scale
- `--block`           Full-width
- `--compact` / `--dense`   Reduced padding
- `--inline`          Inline layout

## Tokens (override on `:root` or under `[data-template="X"]`)

Brand:        --ux-brand, --ux-brand-2, --ux-brand-3, --ux-brand-fg, --ux-brand-soft
Status:       --ux-leaf, --ux-warn, --ux-danger, --ux-info  (each has *-soft, *-fg)
Surfaces:     --ux-bg, --ux-bg-1 .. --ux-bg-4
Lines:        --ux-line, --ux-line-2, --ux-line-3
Text:         --ux-ink, --ux-ink-2, --ux-ink-3, --ux-ink-4
Spacing:      --ux-space-0 .. --ux-space-10  (4px scale)
Radii:        --ux-radius-xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl/pill
Typography:   --ux-text-2xs .. --ux-text-5xl, --ux-leading-*, --ux-tracking-*
Motion:       --ux-dur-fast/base/slow, --ux-ease-out/spring
Z-index:      --ux-z-base/sticky/drawer/modal/toast/tooltip
Layout:       --ux-topbar-h, --ux-sidebar-w, --ux-sidebar-w-collapsed, --ux-page-pad, --ux-page-max
Fonts:        --ux-font-sans, --ux-font-display, --ux-font-mono

## Glass / blur

Apply translucency + backdrop blur to any surface. Built-in on .ux-topbar, .ux-sidebar, .ux-modal, .ux-drawer, and .ux-card--glass. Available as utilities for any other element:

- `.ux-glass`           medium blur (14px)
- `.ux-glass--strong`   heavy blur (22px)
- `.ux-glass--soft`     light blur (10px)

All fall back to a solid `--ux-bg-2` background where `backdrop-filter` isn't supported.

## Class catalog (per source file)

Each section below corresponds to one CSS file in `lib/css/components/`.
Block classes appear first; their `__elements` and `--modifiers` follow.
